newt.name: newt
newt.notes: Can drain strength or dexterity on hit. Do NOT melee as wizard. Let pet handle it.

jackal.name: jackal
jackal.notes: Fast mover, low damage. Let pet handle or flee if HP < 60%.

fox.name: fox
fox.notes: Faster than jackal. Flee if HP < 60%, especially if combined with other enemies.

kitten.name: kitten
kitten.notes: Your starting pet. Do NOT attack. Let it fight for you. Use wait to let it move first.

grid bug.name: grid bug
grid bug.notes: Only moves in cardinal directions. Easy to dodge diagonally. Low XP.

kobold.name: kobold
kobold.notes: Weak melee. Sometimes carries items. Let pet handle.

goblin.name: goblin
goblin.notes: Weak early enemy. Can carry items. Avoid melee as wizard.
